title: Mylara Lingeshwara Temple
tagline: Mylara Lingeshwara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Mylara Lingeshwara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to a form of the Hindu god Shiva in Mylara, in the southwest of Hoovina Hadagali taluk, Vijayanagara district, Karnataka, Indi
overview.description: Mylara Lingeshwara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to a form of the Hindu god Shiva in Mylara, in the southwest of Hoovina Hadagali taluk, Vijayanagara district, Karnataka, India, 2 km from the Tungabhadra River.

topPlaces.name: Havanur
topPlaces.description: Havanur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Haveri taluk of Haveri district in North Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Guttal
topPlaces.description: Guttal is a town in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Haveri taluk of Haveri district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Chaudayyadanapura
topPlaces.description: Chaudayyadanapur is a small village in Ranebennur taluk of Haveri District in Karnataka state of India. All facets of Indian civilisation (religion, art, and poetry) are exemplified in an exquisite Mukteshwara temple, located within the village.

Chaudayyadanapur is a small village in Ranebennur taluk of Haveri District in Karnataka state of India. All facets of Indian civilisation (religion, art, and poetry) are exemplified in an exquisite Mukteshwara temple, located within the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mylara Lingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mylara Lingeshwara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mylara Lingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (90 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mylara Lingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mylara Lingeshwara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mylara Lingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mylara Lingeshwara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mylara Lingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Havanur, Guttal, Chaudayyadanapura.
